answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

steps.title: Certification
steps.objective: Complete a structured certification or course to build a strong foundation for data scientist

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate (Coursera)
IBM Data Science Professional Certificate (Coursera)
Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Scientist Associate
AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty
SAS Certified Professional: AI and Machine Learning

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data scientist to build a strong learning foundation

steps.title: Core Skill Learning
steps.objective: Build a solid foundation in the essential skills for data scientist

resources.title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate on Coursera
Machine Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng on Coursera
Mode Analytics SQL Tutorial
Pandas User Guide and Documentation
Khan Academy Statistics and Probability Course

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), machine learning algorithms, and statistical modelling — these are the essential building blocks for a data scientist

steps.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
steps.objective: Deepen your expertise with intermediate and advanced skills for data scientist

resources.title: Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng on Coursera
Machine Learning Engineering for Production (MLOps) Specialization on Coursera
Introduction to Apache Spark on Databricks Academy
Causal Inference for The Brave and True (Open-source Book)
Machine Learning with TensorFlow on Google Cloud Specialization

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in data visualisation, sql and databases, and feature engineering, applying them through exercises and case studies

steps.title: Hands-on Practice
steps.objective: Apply your skills through real-world projects and practical experience

resources.title: Kaggle: Data Science Competitions and Notebooks
DataCamp: Guided Data Science Projects
Scikit-learn User Guide and Example Gallery
Google Cloud Skills Boost: Data Science & Machine Learning Labs

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), and machine learning algorithms in realistic scenarios

steps.title: Portfolio Building
steps.objective: Create a professional portfolio showcasing your best work and projects

resources.title: How to Build a Data Science Portfolio on GitHub
A Practical Guide to Storytelling with Data for Data Scientists
Streamlit's Getting Started Tutorial (Build Interactive Data Apps)
Your First End-to-End Data Science Project Walkthrough
How to Write a Great Data Science Blog Post

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

steps.title: CV / Profile Building
steps.objective: Prepare your professional profile, CV, and online presence

resources.title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate (Career Resources Included)
Optimizing Your LinkedIn Profile (LinkedIn Learning Course)
How to Create an Outstanding Data Science Portfolio (Towards Data Science Article)
Applicant Tracking System (ATS) Friendly Resume Guide (TopResume)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data scientist skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

steps.title: Job Application / Freelancing
steps.objective: Apply for data scientist positions and explore freelancing opportunities

resources.title: Wuzzuf - Data Scientist Jobs in Egypt
Forasna - Data Scientist Jobs in Egypt

Akhtaboot - Data Scientist Jobs in Egypt

Khamsat - Data Analysis Services (Arabic)

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data scientist positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
